allow: PowerShell(Start-Process "C:\\Program Files\\Docker\\Docker\\Docker Desktop.exe" -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue; Start-Sleep -Seconds 3; Write-Output "Docker Desktop launch attempted")

PowerShell($env:PATH += ";C:\\Program Files\\Docker\\Docker\\resources\\bin;C:\\ProgramData\\DockerDesktop\\version-bin"; $maxWait = 60; $waited = 0; while \($waited -lt $maxWait\) { Start-Sleep -Seconds 5; $waited += 5; $result = docker ps 2>&1; if \($LASTEXITCODE -eq 0\) { Write-Output "Docker ready after ${waited}s"; break } else { Write-Output "Waiting... ${waited}s" } }; if \($waited -ge $maxWait\) { Write-Output "Docker not ready after ${maxWait}s" })

PowerShell($conn = New-Object System.Net.Sockets.TcpClient; try { $conn.Connect\("127.0.0.1", 5432\); Write-Output "Port 5432 OPEN - PostgreSQL may be running"; $conn.Close\(\) } catch { Write-Output "Port 5432 CLOSED - PostgreSQL not running" })
PowerShell($env:PGPASSWORD = "notionlocal"; & "C:\\Program Files\\PostgreSQL\\18\\bin\\psql.exe" -U notionlocal -h localhost -d notionlocal -c "\\l" 2>&1; Write-Output "Exit: $LASTEXITCODE")
PowerShell($env:PGPASSWORD = "postgres"; & "C:\\Program Files\\PostgreSQL\\18\\bin\\psql.exe" -U postgres -h localhost -c "SELECT version\(\);" 2>&1; Write-Output "Exit: $LASTEXITCODE")
PowerShell($env:PGPASSWORD = ""; & "C:\\Program Files\\PostgreSQL\\18\\bin\\psql.exe" -U $env:USERNAME -h localhost -c "SELECT current_user, version\(\);" 2>&1; Write-Output "Exit: $LASTEXITCODE")
